item.title: Plane Crash Memorial, LNG Cost Dispute, Shanty Town
item.ns0:title: Plane Crash Memorial, LNG Cost Dispute, Shanty Town
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, a grieving North Andros community gathers for a somber memorial service to honor the ten victims of the Independence Day plane crash. A former prime minister raises sharp questions over the cost of the government's new energy project, while over 200 residents in an unregulated community receive final eviction notices. We also bring you emotional tributes for the victims of the Shirley Street traffic tragedy and the details of a dramatic rescue following a serious crash on the Sidney Poitier Bridge. Join us for these stories, the latest in sports, and a viral musical performance that is capturing the nation’s attention.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, a grieving North Andros community gathers for a somber memorial service to honor the ten victims of the Independence Day plane crash. A former prime minister raises sharp questions over the cost of the government's new energy project, while over 200 residents in an unregulated community receive final eviction notices. We also bring you emotional tributes for the victims of the Shirley Street traffic tragedy and the details of a dramatic rescue following a serious crash on the Sidney Poitier Bridge. Join us for these stories, the latest in sports, and a viral musical performance that is capturing the nation’s attention.
-----

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, a grieving North Andros community gathers for a somber memorial service to honor the ten victims of the Independence Day plane crash. A former prime minister raises sharp questions over the cost of the government's new energy project, while over 200 residents in an unregulated community receive final eviction notices. We also bring you emotional tributes for the victims of the Shirley Street traffic tragedy and the details of a dramatic rescue following a serious crash on the Sidney Poitier Bridge. Join us for these stories, the latest in sports, and a viral musical performance that is capturing the nation’s attention.
